open_problems.summary: Cold/lateral bg1s (014, crosswind, offsets) never arm early-in; need non-early-in lever
mean_bg≈2; raw~17 — need many cases to bg≥3–4, not more bg1→2 bands
Early inside-offset works for hot cluster (000/002/006); generalize feature→hold, don't case-ID

shared_facts.fact: Official raw uses 0.60*mean+0.28*q25+0.12*hard; 100*mean_score~22 is not leaderboard
Clipped tau≤1.2 understates early ym — use unclipped for arming features
L2b antiscrub (stronger post-g0 quiet + non-glued race punch) installed as v228 raw~17.74
Cold skip-2nd-smash alone did not move raw (flat/down) — need different cold lever
Softening early ym gate (1.02→1.00) soft-regressed; tend-scale band2 was +0.02-ish no install
Wake21: brainstorm before locking optimizer — candidates are evolve-θ / FSM-volley / MPC / RL-residual / hybrid. Hand-tuning paused as primary.
Locked hybrid volley FSM + CEM (policy_v230 + evolve_volley). Smoke θ matches v229 raw 17.77. First 2-gen CEM no install (best~17.75).

do: Focus then suite via parallel_suite.py; install only raw>champ+0.02 and nom≥4/0.70
Steal transferable mechanisms from other lanes' findings; compose on champ
Post every trial to this board (pass AND fail)
Keep antiscrub quiet+unglued race when composing
Continue CEM on volley θ; compose multiagent only as proposal seeds
Run evolve_volley as primary overnight driver
dont: Retry mechanisms already marked failed unless composed differently
Cold quiet extension alone without bounce/tip change
Apply band2 tend~arm_ym scaling to band1/hot early_in
Lower race y_miss arm below ~0.80 without protecting early_in winners

findings.summary: L2b stronger post-g0 quiet (y_miss>0.70 / glue coast) + race punch requires dxy in (0.22,0.62) and far_off>0.08
findings.do: Keep antiscrub quiet+unglued race when composing

findings.summary: L1c: band2 inside-hold scales with arm_ym (0.83..0.93) composed on v228 antiscrub → raw 17.77
L3c cold longer quiet on y_miss>1.05 flat vs champ — not enough alone
findings.dont: Cold quiet extension alone without bounce/tip change

findings.summary: L1d tend-scale on band1 hurt 000 (bg3→2) — don't extend tend scaling to band1
findings.dont: Apply band2 tend~arm_ym scaling to band1/hot early_in

findings.summary: L3d race ym>0.65 earlier arm hurt 000 focus — too aggressive race gate
findings.dont: Lower race y_miss arm below ~0.80 without protecting early_in winners

handoffs.message: Rebase onto new champ policy_ma_L2b_antiscrub.py; keep L2 antiscrub if present
Champ is policy_ma_L2b_antiscrub.py; cold miss still open — don't regress antiscrub
Cold skip-smash alone failed; try composing cold lever ON TOP of v228 antiscrub, not instead of it
Rebase onto new champ policy_ma_L1c_tend_scale.py; keep L2 antiscrub if present

Champ now v229=antiscrub+tend_scale; cold still open — compose on v229, don't drop either mechanism
Wake39 flat: need g2+ mass (bg3/4 rate), not race-gate tweaks that hit 000. Antiscrub+tend stay.
